title: Microbes, Memory, & Aging
creator: Integrative Health Partners
excerpt: Many people as they age notice their memory isn’t as good as it once was. Because this tends to happen as we get older we naturally tend to point the blame on “aging”. But could it be that as the years roll by the colony of microbes in your gut is slowly deteriorating, causing a […]
